title: stachys zeyheri
intro: Stachys zeyheri, also known as Wild Bergamot or Bergamot Mint, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the eastern parts of South Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Stachys zeyheri include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to alleviate respiratory problems like coughs and colds. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically for therapeutic purposes.
